name: Cal.com
description: Cal.com is an open-source scheduling and calendar infrastructure API. Manage event types, bookings, availability schedules, slots, teams, calendars, and webhooks programmatically.

capabilities.name: bookings_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all bookings with optional filtering by status, attendee, event type, and date range.

capabilities.name: bookings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific booking by its unique identifier.

capabilities.name: bookings_create
capabilities.description: Create a new booking for a specific event type at a given date and time.

capabilities.name: bookings_reschedule
capabilities.description: Reschedule an existing booking to a new date and time.

capabilities.name: bookings_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an existing booking, optionally providing a cancellation reason.

capabilities.name: bookings_confirm
capabilities.description: Confirm a pending booking that requires manual confirmation.

capabilities.name: bookings_decline
capabilities.description: Decline a pending booking request.

capabilities.name: event_types_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all event types configured for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: event_types_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific event type by its ID.

capabilities.name: event_types_create
capabilities.description: Create a new event type with specified title, duration, and settings.

capabilities.name: event_types_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing event type's settings.

capabilities.name: event_types_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an event type by its ID.

capabilities.name: schedules_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all availability schedules for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: schedules_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific schedule by its ID.

capabilities.name: schedules_create
capabilities.description: Create a new availability schedule.

capabilities.name: schedules_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing schedule.

capabilities.name: schedules_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a schedule by its ID.

capabilities.name: slots_list_available
capabilities.description: Get available time slots for a specific event type within a date range.

capabilities.name: slots_reserve
capabilities.description: Reserve a time slot temporarily before completing a booking.

capabilities.name: slots_delete_reserved
capabilities.description: Release a previously reserved time slot.

capabilities.name: calendars_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all connected calendars for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: calendars_busy_times
capabilities.description: Get busy time ranges from connected calendars.

capabilities.name: me_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

capabilities.name: me_update
capabilities.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all webhook subscriptions.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook subscription for real-time event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific webhook by its ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: teams_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all teams for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: teams_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific team by its ID.

capabilities.name: teams_create
capabilities.description: Create a new team.

capabilities.name: teams_update
capabilities.description: Update a team's settings.

capabilities.name: teams_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a team by its ID.
